problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
